title: stelis zunagensis
intro: Stelis zunagensis, also known as the Zunagense Stelis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Stelis zunagensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by drying and grinding its leaves or roots, which can then be brewed into teas or used to make infusions.
